# Labette County Storage

> Affordable, secure self storage in Parsons, Kansas. Locally owned and operated by Midwest Storage Solutions, LLC.

## About

Labette County Storage offers self storage units in Parsons, Kansas. We provide month-to-month rentals, 24/7 security camera monitoring, drive-up access, a fenced and gated facility, a free lock with every unit, and a 10% military discount. We are a veteran-owned business.

## Location

- Address: 1830 S US-59, Parsons, Kansas 67357
- Phone: (620) 778-8196
- Email: info@labettecountystorage.com
- Hours: Mon-Sat 9am-6pm, Sun Noon-4pm

## Unit Sizes

- 10x10 (100 sq ft) - Small bedroom size, ~$75/mo
- 10x15 (150 sq ft) - Large bedroom size, ~$95/mo
- 10x20 (200 sq ft) - One-car garage size, ~$115/mo
- 10x30 (300 sq ft) - Large garage size, ~$135/mo
- 20x20 (400 sq ft) - Two-car garage size, ~$155/mo
- 20x30 (600 sq ft) - Largest available, ~$185/mo

## Features

- Month-to-month leases with no long-term contracts
- 24/7 security camera monitoring
- Fenced and gated facility
- Drive-up access at every unit
- Free lock included with every rental
- 10% military discount for active duty and veterans
- Online booking and payments
- Tenant protection plans available ($2,000-$5,000 coverage)
- No hidden fees

## Blog Posts

- [Why Storage Facility Security Matters](https://www.labettecountystorage.com/posts/why-storage-facility-security-matters): What makes a storage facility truly secure — cameras, lighting, access control, and what to ask before renting.
- [Moving to Parsons, KS? What You Need to Know](https://www.labettecountystorage.com/posts/moving-to-parsons): Practical tips on neighborhoods, local resources, and how self storage can make your move to Labette County easier.
- [How to Choose the Right Storage Unit Size](https://www.labettecountystorage.com/posts/choosing-right-storage-unit-size): A room-by-room breakdown of common unit sizes from 10x10 to 20x30 to help you pick the right fit.
- [How to Protect Your Belongings from Kansas Humidity](https://www.labettecountystorage.com/posts/protect-belongings-kansas-humidity): Practical tips to protect furniture, electronics, and clothing from southeast Kansas humidity in your storage unit.
- [Why Self Storage Makes Moving Easier](https://www.labettecountystorage.com/posts/self-storage-makes-moving-easier): How a storage unit reduces stress during a move — staging, decluttering, and flexible timelines explained.
- [Tips for Storing Items Long-Term](https://www.labettecountystorage.com/posts/tips-storing-items-long-term): How to properly pack, protect, and organize your storage unit so everything stays in great condition for months or years.
- [What Is Tenant Protection and Do You Need It?](https://www.labettecountystorage.com/posts/what-is-tenant-protection): What tenant protection covers, how much it costs, and whether it makes sense for your stored belongings.
- [Storage Solutions for Labette County Homeowners](https://www.labettecountystorage.com/posts/storage-solutions-labette-county-homeowners): How Parsons homeowners use self storage for renovations, seasonal gear, decluttering, and more.
